assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: AddBffBlazorClient() is NOT present on the server side — required for Blazor WASM integration

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Client uses generic AddAuthorizationCore and AddHttpClient, not AddBffBlazorClient with polling
